title: CodeClimate Visualiser project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for the CodeClimate Visualiser VS Code extension. Place this file at .vscode/codeclimate-visualiser.json.

customColumns.description: Extra columns to display in the issue table. Columns are ordered by their 'index' value alongside the built-in columns (Severity=0, Category=1, Check Name=2, Source=3, File=4, Line=5, Description=6). Custom columns with the same index as a built-in column appear after it.

index.description: Display position. Use built-in column indices as reference points: Severity=0, Category=1, Check Name=2, Source=3, File=4, Line=5, Description=6. Any value > 6 places the column after Description. Large values are clamped to last position.

reportPatterns.description: Glob patterns or absolute paths to CodeClimate JSON/NDJSON report files. Each entry is either a plain glob string or a pattern object with optional regex extraction for custom column values.

oneOf.description: A glob pattern (e.g. '**/codeclimate.json') or absolute path. No custom column values.

glob.description: Workspace-relative glob pattern or absolute path.

regex.description: Optional regular expression applied to the matched filename (basename only). Capture groups can be referenced in 'values' using $0, $1, … (0-indexed capture group number).

values.description: Map of custom column name → value for all issues from matched files. Use $0, $1, … to reference regex capture groups, or plain strings for static values. Omit or set to null for empty.
